notes: VAL-CP-001: Ctrl+P opens CommandPaletteScreen — validated via Textual Pilot in test_inbox_app.py::test_command_palette_ctrl_p_opens_screen.
VAL-CP-002: Esc closes palette — validated via test_command_palette_escape_closes_screen.
VAL-CP-003: Typing filters list — validated via test_command_palette_typing_filters_list.
VAL-CP-004: Enter executes command and closes palette — validated via test_command_palette_enter_with_match_closes_screen.
VAL-CP-005: All 8 tab-switch commands registered — validated in test_build_commands_covers_all_tabs.
VAL-CP-006: Fuzzy scoring: exact > prefix > substring > none — validated in fuzzy_score unit tests.
VAL-CP-007: NLP routing: high confidence executes, low confidence shows suggestions, LLM unavailable falls back gracefully — validated in resolve_nlp unit tests.
VAL-CP-008: All commands have required fields and valid categories — validated in test_build_commands tests.
